description_long: This house features a raised foundation supported by multiple columns, with a spacious wooden deck and staircase on one side, and a covered carport or storage area on the other. The exterior is clad in light-colored wood siding, complemented by a steeply pitched red gable roof with dormer windows. The front facade showcases two prominent dormers with blue-framed windows and a central entryway leading onto the deck. The rear of the house includes a large set of windows and a wide deck with a gate, ideal for outdoor living. The window arrangement is largely symmetrical, and the house is elevated, likely to accommodate uneven terrain or provide flood protection. Architectural details such as the overhanging eaves, wooden railings, and multiple rooflines give the house a Craftsman-inspired appearance.
description: A raised wooden house with a red gable roof, dormer windows, and a large deck with stairs and railings. The exterior features light wood siding and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing two dormer windows, the main deck with stairs on the left, and a covered carport on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof, a single window, and the depth of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with two dormer windows, the extended deck, and the absence of the carport.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large set of windows opening onto the deck, with a visible gate and supporting columns.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormer windows and a large window set at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via a raised wooden deck with steps, simple railing, and a central door under an overhanging roof
